title: Puglia & Sicily — Food & Wine Odyssey
summary: 12-night culinary immersion across Puglia and Sicily. Three distinctive properties: Masseria Moroseta (rustic-luxe farmhouse), Palazzo Daniele (restored palazzo in Lecce), Verdura Resort (coastal Sicily with Michelin dining). Highlights: private cooking session with Michelin chef Ciccio Ferreri, natural wine tour of Etna producers, Lecce street food crawl, ceramics workshop in Grottaglie.
